extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Connects the Kaiord workout editor to Garmin Connect via your browser session
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store.

checking.description: Status text while the popup probes the connection.

checkingConnection.description: Accessible label for the checking status pill.

notConnected.description: Status text/label when the bridge is not connected.

notConnectedGarmin.message: Not connected — open Garmin Connect and refresh
notConnectedGarmin.description: Status text when the Garmin Connect session is missing.

connectedToGarmin.description: Status text when the bridge is connected.

connected.description: Accessible label for the connected status pill.

profileStale.message: Profile snapshot is stale. Open Kaiord to refresh.
profileStale.description: Athlete-card placeholder when the cached snapshot is stale.

noProfile.message: No profile yet. Open Kaiord to set FTP, pace, and HR.
noProfile.description: Athlete-card placeholder when no snapshot exists.

noThresholds.message: Profile has no thresholds yet. Open Kaiord to set FTP, pace, and HR.
noThresholds.description: Athlete-card placeholder when the snapshot has no threshold fields.

labelSport.description: Athlete-card field label for the active sport.

labelPace.description: Athlete-card field label for threshold running pace.

labelMaxHr.description: Athlete-card field label for maximum heart rate.

labelWeight.description: Athlete-card field label for body weight.

workoutLibrary.description: Rollup line showing the total number of stored workouts.

lastPush.description: Rollup line prefix for the most recent workout push.

captionSync.description: Caption above the sync rollup section.

updatedAgo.description: Athlete-card freshness line, e.g. 'Updated 10 minutes ago'.

updatedJustNow.description: Athlete-card freshness line for a very recent update.

momentsAgo.description: Relative time used in the last-push rollup line.

openEditor.description: Primary footer button opening the Kaiord editor.

openEditorAria.description: Accessible label for the open-editor button.

openGarmin.description: Secondary footer button opening Garmin Connect.

openGarminAria.description: Accessible label for the open-Garmin button.

retry.description: Button that retries the connection check.

refresh.description: Accessible label for the header refresh button.
